compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1000e DE, Pro 600e, Pro 1000e DE Flex
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: proprietary Gavita e-series bus (RJ 4P4C controller side / RJ 6P4C fixture side)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim on high temperature, auto-shutdown, sunrise/sunset ramping (0-30 min)
compatible_devices.notes: 1 channel; up to 40 single bus or 500 repeater bus fixtures; output range 50-115% (boost mode); supports 400W-1000W ballasts; HPS and LEP e-series only; no fan or ECM control on EL1

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1700e LED, Pro 900e LED, CT1930e LED
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter Interconnect Cable (HGC906716 25ft or HGC906717 10ft)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim on high temperature, sunrise/sunset ramping
compatible_devices.notes: LED adapter cable mandatory; dimming range 50-100% only (no 115% boost for LED); confirmed for 1700e, 900e, CT1930e; EL1 has no fan or ECM ports
